summary.recommendation: PROCEED TO STEP 5 (REFINEMENT). Best method (RWR) at 83.7% is in the 80-95% band; 18 of 35 algebraic failures and 17 of 17 RWR failures are categorised as fixable, with the largest improvements expected from fixing (a) the BR→Seed_Size coupling and (b) restoring an explicit LAFL→maturation→Seed_Size sub-cascade.

comparison.strengths: Deterministic, fast, one-step computation; correctly handles 28/43 single KOs and all triple KOs; transparent edge contributions.
comparison.weaknesses: Lowest accuracy of three methods. Geometric mean dilution at the 16-input Integument_Growth hub absorbs many OE perturbations as 'unchanged' (T008, T011, T039). Fails 14 cases for non-convergence under feedback loops (DA1↔DA2↔EOD1, FUS3↔LEC2). Cannot resolve borderline ratios near the 0.05 threshold (T015, T110).

comparison.best_params: K=5.0, n=1 (Hill activation/inhibition; 24 K×n combinations swept)
comparison.strengths: 100% convergence (handles feedback loops algebraic mode could not). Substantial κ band. Best-K=5.0 indicates the seed-size network favours a higher half-saturation than default (i.e., responses are gentler than a steep Hill switch). Best-n=1 = Michaelis-Menten-like response, consistent with biological additivity rather than ultrasensitive switching.
comparison.weaknesses: Still 21 failures, most of which are shared with algebraic and reflect structural network issues rather than parameter choice. Composite_collapse cases (T012, T014, T026-T028) cannot be fixed by parameter sweep.

comparison.best_params: alpha=0.6 (restart probability; ties at 0.6–0.85 with peak accuracy)
comparison.strengths: Highest accuracy and highest κ (substantial band). Robust to composite-collapse cases by treating signed-graph propagation rather than rigid composite gm=0.997 algebra. Resolves 4 borderline cases that algebraic missed (T008, T011, T039, T110).
comparison.weaknesses: Loses 1–2 directional cases that ODE caught (T043 RAV1 OE direction inversion; T072–T075 LAFL TF KOs share root cause with all methods). Cannot model non-linear hormone dynamics that ODE Hill captures. κ=0.69 still indicates substantial-but-not-almost-perfect agreement.
